sentences.arabic: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ رُكِيزَةٌ أَسَاسِيَّةٌ فِي مَنْظُومَةِ الْعَقِيدَةِ الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ، وَقَدْ أَوْضَحَ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَتَعَارَضُ مَعَ الأَخْذِ بِالأَسْبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Tawakkul na Allaha osnovna je okosnica sistema islamskog vjerovanja, a šejh Ibn Utejmin, Allah mu se smilovao, pojаsnio je da se ne kosi s poduzimanjem uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Tawakkul upon Allah is a fundamental pillar in the Islamic belief system, and Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen, may Allah have mercy on him, clarified that it does not contradict taking practical means.

sentences.arabic: رَوَى الإِمَامُ الْبُخَارِيُّ أَنَّ رَجُلًا قَالَ لِلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «أَعْقِلُهَا وَأَتَوَكَّلُ أَوْ أُطْلِقُهَا وَأَتَوَكَّلُ؟» فَقَالَ: «اعْقِلْهَا وَتَوَكَّلْ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي الأَدَبِ الْمُفْرَدِ].
sentences.translation: Imam Buhari prenosi da je čovjek rekao Poslaniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem: «Da li da ga vezem pa se pouzdavam ili da ga pustim pa se pouzdavam?» On reče: «Veži ga i pouzdaj se.» [Prenosi ga Buhari u Al-Adabul-mufredu].
sentences.translationEn: Imam al-Bukhari narrated that a man said to the Prophet (peace be upon him): «Should I tie it and rely on Allah, or leave it free and rely on Allah?» He said: «Tie it and rely on Allah.» [Narrated by al-Bukhari in al-Adab al-Mufrad].

sentences.arabic: يُفِيدُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَنَّ الإِسْلَامَ يَدْعُو إِلَى التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الاِعْتِمَادِ عَلَى اللهِ وَبَذْلِ الأَسْبَابِ الْمَادِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje da islam poziva na ravnotežu između oslanjanja na Allaha i poduzimanja materijalnih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith indicates that Islam calls for a balance between relying on Allah and taking material means.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ قَلْبَ الْمُتَوَكِّلِ مُطْمَئِنٌّ لأَنَّهُ يُدْرِكُ أَنَّ النَّتِيجَةَ بِيَدِ اللهِ وَحْدَهُ بَعْدَ بَذْلِ الْجُهْدِ.
sentences.translation: Srce onoga koji se oslanja je mirno jer shvata da je rezultat u Allahovoj ruci jedino nakon ulaganja truda.
sentences.translationEn: The heart of the one who relies on Allah is at peace because he realises that the outcome is in Allah's hand alone after exerting effort.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَدُّ التَّوَكُّلُ الصَّحِيحُ مُقَوِّيًا لِلنَّفْسِ وَمُخَفِّفًا لِوَطْأَةِ الْهُمُومِ وَالضُّغُوطِ.
sentences.translation: Ispravni tawakkul jača dušu i ublažava teret briga i pritisaka.
sentences.translationEn: True tawakkul strengthens the soul and lightens the burden of worries and pressures.
